title: RSA migration: C shims for PKCS#1v1.5 sign/verify
description:
Add wolfcrypt_rsa_pkcs1v15_* C shims to compat_shim.c for PKCS#1v1.5 signature operations. These replace EVP_DigestSign/EVP_DigestVerify usage.

Functions to implement (guarded by #ifndef NO_RSA):
- wolfcrypt_rsa_pkcs1v15_sign(void* ctx, int hash_nid, const byte* msg, word32 msg_len, byte* sig, word32* sig_len)
  - Hash msg internally (wc_Sha256Hash / wc_Sha384Hash / wc_Sha512Hash per hash_nid)
  - Build DigestInfo DER via wc_EncodeSignature
  - Sign with wc_RsaSSL_Sign (PKCS#1v1.5 raw)
- wolfcrypt_rsa_pkcs1v15_verify(void* ctx, int hash_nid, const byte* msg, word32 msg_len, const byte* sig, word32 sig_len)
  - Hash msg internally
  - Build DigestInfo DER via wc_EncodeSignature
  - Verify with wc_RsaSSL_VerifyInline
  - Compare decrypted DigestInfo to expected; return 0 or BAD_FUNC_ARG

hash_nid values: WC_HASH_TYPE_SHA256 = 4, WC_HASH_TYPE_SHA384 = 5, WC_HASH_TYPE_SHA512 = 6 (from wolfssl/wolfcrypt/hash.h)

Acceptance criteria:
- Signs a test message and verifies it round-trip
- PKCS#1v1.5 is deterministic: post-migration signature bytes must exactly match the EVP baseline from wolfssl-rs-siu
